summary: GST Reports module fully tested and working. All 3 reports (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, HSN Summary) displaying correctly with proper data. Fixed export JSON endpoint bug where settings.get() was called on None.
passed_tests: GET /api/gst-reports/gstr3b - Returns GSTR-3B summary report
GSTR-3B contains summary section (total_vouchers, total_output_tax, total_itc, net_tax_payable)
GSTR-3B Section 3.1 (Outward Supplies) structure correct with B2B/B2C breakdown
GSTR-3B Section 4 (Eligible ITC) structure with IGST/CGST/SGST
GSTR-3B Section 6 (Tax Payable) structure with totals
GET /api/gst-reports/gstr1 - Returns GSTR-1 outward supplies report
GSTR-1 summary section (total_invoices, b2b_count, b2c_large_count, b2c_small_count)
GSTR-1 totals section (total_taxable, total_cgst, total_sgst, total_invoice_value)
GSTR-1 B2B invoices section
GSTR-1 B2C invoices sections (large/small)
GSTR-1 HSN summary section
GET /api/gst-reports/hsn-summary - Returns HSN/SAC wise summary
HSN Summary structure (period, hsn_summary, totals, record_count)
HSN Summary totals (total_quantity, total_value, taxable_value, igst, cgst, sgst)
GET /api/gst-reports/export/gstr1-json - Exports GSTR-1 in JSON format for GST portal
Date filters work for current month
Date filters work for last month
GSTR-3B values are valid numbers (no NaN)
UI: GST Reports page loads with report menu
UI: GSTR-3B displays summary cards (Total Vouchers, Output Tax, ITC, Net Tax Payable)
UI: GSTR-3B Section 3.1 table visible
UI: GSTR-3B Section 4 (Eligible ITC) table visible
UI: GSTR-1 displays summary cards (Total Invoices, B2B, B2C Large, B2C Small, Total Value)
UI: GSTR-1 tabs (B2B Invoices, B2C Invoices, HSN Summary, Totals)
UI: HSN Summary displays summary cards (HSN Codes, Total Quantity, Taxable Value, Total Tax)
UI: HSN Summary table with proper columns
UI: This Month/Last Month date filter buttons visible
UI: Export JSON button visible
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 35564 - export_gstr1_json endpoint was crashing when settings=None. Changed to: gstin = gstin or (settings.get('gstin', '') if settings else '')
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing sales data for GST reports testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST Reports module is fully functional. Three report types available: GSTR-1 (Outward Supplies), GSTR-3B (Monthly Summary), HSN Summary. All APIs at /api/gst-reports/* working. Export JSON endpoint fixed for null settings. Test data shows 13 invoices with ₹2,948 taxable value and ₹530.64 total tax.

hsn_summary_report.data: Shows HSN-wise breakdown with tax details
